title: T-044 — Server Action buildD365 (single-click flow + MFA gate + V01-V07 pre-flight)
prompt:
# T-044 — buildD365 single-click action

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §10.6, §2.3 (MFA), §12 V04/V07
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
buildD365(productCode, mfaToken) Server Action: enforces d365_builder.execute permission, MFA verification, runs V01-V08 pre-flight (must pass V01-V06 + V07 PASS + V04 no Missing), generates workbook via T-042, persists via T-043, sets fa.built=TRUE, emits fa.built event.

## Implementation contract
New apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/build-d365.ts. Pipeline: 1) RBAC check; 2) verifyMfaToken (TOTP via Clerk or speakeasy); 3) run V01..V08 + V04; 4) build workbook; 5) persistDownloadable; 6) UPDATE product SET built=TRUE; 7) emit fa.built. Single tx for steps 5-7. Returns {downloadUrl, expiresAt}.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/build-d365.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/__tests__/build-d365.test.ts [create]
- packages/auth/src/verify-mfa-token.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given Jane (npd_manager + valid TOTP) and FA passing V01-V07 + V04 no Missing, when buildD365 runs, then product.built=TRUE, fa_builder_outputs row exists, fa.built event emitted, downloadUrl returned
2. Given V04 returns Missing for one material, when buildD365 runs, then GateError 'V04_MISSING' thrown without setting built
3. Given user role core_user attempts buildD365, when called, then AuthError thrown

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 tests covering happy path, V04 gate, RBAC denial
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test build-d365'

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip MFA
- Do not commit fa.built before file is persisted
- Do not emit fa.built without successful upload

pipeline_inputs.description: Single-click buildD365 Server Action chaining RBAC + MFA + V01-V08 pre-flight + workbook + storage + state transition.
pipeline_inputs.details: Single-tx commit of file + DB state. MFA verification via TOTP. Returns downloadUrl + expiresAt.
out_of_scope: Do not implement wizard flow here (T-046)
Do not implement V04 cache refresh (T-064)
